'''kamobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uitspan|uitspan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uitspan|uitspan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kamobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæmebeth|kæmebeth]] || [[word:kæmebej|kæmebej]] || [[word:kæmebesh|kæmebesh]] || [[word:kæmebe|kæmebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kamomoboth|kamomoboth]] || [[word:kamomoboj|kamomoboj]] || [[word:kamomobosh|kamomobosh]] || [[word:kamomobo|kamomobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kamoboth|kamoboth]] || [[word:kamoboj|kamoboj]] || [[word:kamobosh|kamobosh]] || [[word:kamobo|kamobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kamofboth|kamofboth]] || [[word:kamofboj|kamofboj]] || [[word:kamofbosh|kamofbosh]] || [[word:kamofbof|kamofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kamobotho|kamobotho]] || [[word:kamobojo|kamobojo]] || [[word:kamobosho|kamobosho]] || [[word:kamoboko|kamoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kamoboth|kamoboth]] || [[word:kamoboj|kamoboj]] || [[word:kamobosh|kamobosh]] || [[word:kamobo|kamobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kamobothol|kamobothol]] || [[word:kamobojol|kamobojol]] || [[word:kamoboshol|kamoboshol]] || [[word:kamobokol|kamobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kamobothotho|kamobothotho]] || [[word:kamobojojo|kamobojojo]] || [[word:kamoboshosho|kamoboshosho]] || [[word:kamoboko|kamoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kamobothon|kamobothon]] || [[word:kamobojon|kamobojon]] || [[word:kamoboshon|kamoboshon]] || [[word:kamobokon|kamobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kamobothoro|kamobothoro]] || [[word:kamobojoro|kamobojoro]] || [[word:kamoboshoro|kamoboshoro]] || [[word:kamobokoro|kamobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
